name: Clinton Parks and Recreation
description: Clinton Parks and Recreation is a place to play pickleball in Clinton, CT. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: East Haddam Parks and Recreation
description: Outside courts are free.  Inside courts are $5/game

name: Irene Sheldon Park
description: Come play pickleball at Irene Sheldon Park in Killingworth, CT! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Main St. Park
description: Come play pickleball at Main St. Park in Old Saybrook, CT! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, and water.
hours: Monday - Friday: 9:00am - 4:00pm Building/Track Hours: Monday - Thursday: 7:00am - 8:30pm Friday: 7:00am - 4:00pm Saturday: 9:00am - 4:00pm Sunday - Open Seasonally: November - March, 11:00am - 4:00pm © 2026 Old Saybrook Parks & Recreation Terms ○ Privacy ○ Help ○ How To Provided by MyRec.com Recreation Software

name: Old Saybrook Racquet Club
description: Old Saybrook Racquet Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Old Saybrook, CT. There are 4 clay courts. 2 are indoors and 2 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and trainers or lessons. Reservations are available.

name: Rocco Reale
description: Rocco Reale is a place to play pickleball in Killingworth, CT. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Ted Lane Field
description: Ted Lane Field is a place to play pickleball in Westbrook, CT. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Watrous Park
description: Come play pickleball at Watrous Park in Cromwell, CT! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.
